data_asset_description: ABBV-142 is a lysophosphatidic acid receptor 1 (LPAR1) antagonist antibody being investigated for the treatment of idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF). LPAR1 contributes to the underlying pathology of fibrotic diseases and amplifies inflammation and fibrosis in the lungs, among other tissues. Inhibition of LPAR1 may address systemic sclerosis (SSc) and IPF pathogenesis.

Skyrizi (risankizumab) (ABBV-066) is an anti-IL-23 antibody. Lutikizumab (ABT-981) is an IL-1a/1b antagonist. Risankizumab + lutikizumab (ABBV-166) are being investigated as a combination therapy for the treatment of Crohn's disease and psoriatic arthritis.
ABBV-243 is an integrin β7 antibody,targeting both integrins α4β7 and αEβ7. It is being investigated for the treatment of inflammatory bowel diseases.
ABBV-319 is a steroid-based ADC targeting CD19 being investigated for treatment of systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) and Sjogren's disease (SjD).

Skyrizi (risankizumab) (ABBV-066) is an anti-IL-23 antibody. ABBV-382 is an anti-a4B7 mAb. Risankizumab + ABBV-382 (ABBV-466) are being investigated as a combination therapy for the treatment of Crohn's disease.
ABBV-547 is a next generation anti-IL-23 antibody. ABBV-547 is being investigated as a potential therapy for the treatment of psoriasis.
ABBV-619 is a potential first-in-class in vivo targeted lipid nanoparticle (tLNP) anti-CD19 CAR-T therapy candidate in development for the treatment of B cell-mediated autoimmune diseases.
ABBV-701 is an anti-TL1a antibody that is being investigated for the treatment of inflammatory bowel disease.

ABBV-722 is a lysophosphatidic acid receptor 1 (LPAR1) small molecule antagonist being investigated for the treatment of systemic sclerosis (SSc) and idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF). LPAR1 contributes to the underlying pathology of fibrotic diseases and amplifies inflammation and fibrosis in the lungs, among other tissues. Inhibition of LPAR1 may address SSc and IPF pathogenesis.

ABBV-848 is a small molecule inhibitor of IRAK4 (Interleukin-1 receptor-associated kinase 4) being investigated for the treatment of rheumatoid arthritis (RA). AbbVie holds exclusive rights from Createrna to develop, manufacture, and commercialize ABBV-848 outside of China.

ABBV-8736 is an anti-Triggering Receptor Expressed on Myeloid Cells 1 (TREM1) antibody being investigated for treatment of inflammatory bowel disease (IBD). TREM1 has been identified as a key disease driver gene in IBD, upstream of known inflammatory pathways.

Lutikizumab (ABT-981) is an IL-1a/1b antagonist. Ravagalimab is a CD40 antagonist. Lutikizumab + ravagalimab (ABBV-9832) are being investigated as a combination therapy for the treatment of rheumatoid arthritis.
Lutikizumab (ABT-981) is an IL-1a/1b antagonist being investigated for the treatment of hidradenitis suppurativa (HS), ulcerative colitis (UC), and atopic dermatitis (AD).

data_asset_indication: Axial SpA,Hidradenitis Suppurativa,Atopic Dermatitis,Alopecia Areata,Rheumatoid Arthritis,Takayasu Arteritis,Ankylosing Spondylitis,Crohn's Disease,Vitiligo,Giant Cell Arteritis,Systemic Lupus Erythematosus (SLE),Ulcerative Colitis,Psoriatic Arthritis
data_asset_description: Upadacitinib (ABT-494) is a JAK1 selective inhibitor approved to treat ankylosing spondylitis, atopic dermatitis, axial SpA, Crohn's disease, giant cell arteritis, psoriatic arthritis, rheumatoid arthritis and ulcerative colitis. It is being investigated to treat alopecia areata, hidradenitis suppurativa (HS), systemic lupus erthematosus (SLE), Takayasu arteritis and vitiligo.
ABBV-1042 is an M4 receptor agonist being investigated for bipolar mania.
ABBV-1758 is an amyloid beta (3pE-Aβ) antibody with anti-TfR delivery module in development for the treatment of Alzheimer's disease.
ABBV-2002 is a monoclonal antibody targeting protease-activated receptor 2 (PAR-2) in development as a potential treatment to prevent migraine.

ABBV 932 is a selective D3 dopamine receptor modulator being investigated as a monotherapy for the treatment of bipolar depression and as an adjunctive therapy for generalized anxiety disorder. Developed in partnership with Gedeon Richter.
Bretisilocin is a novel, short-acting serotonin, 5-HT2A receptor agonist in development for major depressive disorder.
Emraclidine is an orally available muscarinic M4 Receptor (PAM) being investigated for the treatment of schizophrenia and other forms of psychosis.
GemibotulinumtoxinA (GemibotA) is a next-generation toxin in development for ventral hernia repair.
Icalcaprant (ABBV-1354) is a kappa opioid receptor (KOR) antagonist being investigated for treatment of depression.

QULIPTA (atogepant) is a calcitonin gene-related peptide (CGRP) receptor antagonist being investigated (outside the U.S.) for the treatment of acute migraine and preventive treatment of menstrual migraine.
Tavapadon is an orally active dopamine D1/D5 receptor selective partial agonist being investigated for the treatment of Parkinson's disease (both monotherapy and adjunctive).
UBRELVY (ubrogepant) is a calcitonin gene-related peptide (CGRP) receptor antagonist being investigated for the preventive treatment of menstrual migraine.

ABBV-1480 (RC148) is an investigational Programmed Cell Death-1 (PD-1)/Vascular Endothelial Growth Factor (VEGF)-targeted bispecific antibody being investigated in multiple advanced solid tumors including non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) and colorectal cancer (CRC). AbbVie holds exclusive rights from RemeGen to develop, manufacture, and commercialize ABBV-1480 outside of the Greater China territory.
ABBV-181 (budigalimab) is an anti-PD1 monoclonal humanized antibody that is being developed for combinations with other AbbVie molecules for solid tumors and hematologic malignancies.

ABBV-2001 (ISB 2001) is a first-in-class trispecific T-cell engager that targets CD38 and BCMA on myeloma cells and CD3 on T cells. It is currently being investigated for relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma. ABBV-2001 was developed using IGI's proprietary BEAT® platform. AbbVie holds exclusive rights to develop, manufacture, and commercialize ABBV-2001 across North America, Europe, Japan and Greater China.
ABBV-324 is an antibody-drug conjugate (ADC) being investigated in advanced solid tumors, including squamous-cell non-small cell lung cancer and hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC).

ABBV-514 is an anti-chemokine C-C motif receptor 8 (CCR8) antibody that is being investigated for the treatment of relapsed non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) and head and neck squamous cell carcinoma (HNSCC) as a single agent and in combination with a PD-1 inhibitor.
ABBV-525 is an oral small-molecule inhibitor of Mucosa-Associated Lymphoid Tissue Lymphoma Translocation Protein 1 (MALT1), being investigated in B-cell malignancies.

data_asset_indication: Relapsed / Refractory Small Cell Lung Cancer,Neuroendocrine Neoplasms,First Line Small Cell Lung Cancer
data_asset_description: ABBV-706 is a seizure protein 6 homolog (SEZ6) targeted antibody-drug conjugate with a topoisomerase 1 inhibitor (Top1i) payload being investigated for the treatment of certain solid tumors.

indication_rows.indication: First Line Small Cell Lung Cancer
Relapsed / Refractory Small Cell Lung Cancer

data_asset_description: ABBV-711 is being investigated in advanced squamous solid tumors including squamous non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) and head and neck squamous cell carcinoma (HNSCC).
ABBV-901 is an antibody-drug conjugate (ADC) being investigated in ovarian cancer.

ABBV-969 is an antibody-drug conjugate (ADC) targeting Prostate-Specific Membrane Antigen (PSMA) and six transmembrane epithelial antigen of the prostate 1 (STEAP1), with a topoisomerase 1 inhibitor (Top1i) payload being investigated to treat metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC).
Elahere (mirvetuximab soravtansine) is a folate receptor alpha-targeting antibody drug conjugate (ADC) with a maytansinoid payload DM4 in platinum resistant and sensitive ovarian cancer.

Emrelis (Teliso-V (telisotuzumab vedotin)) (ABBV-399) is an antibody drug conjugate (ADC) targeting cMet with a monomethyl auristatin E (MMAE) payload that is approved to treat non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC).

data_asset_indication: Richter's Syndrome,Relapsed / Refractory Diffuse Large B-cell Lymphoma,B-cell Non-Hodgkin lymphoma,Relapsed / Refractory Follicular Lymphoma,Relapsed / Refractory Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia,First Line Follicular Lymphoma,First Line Diffuse Large B-cell Lymphoma
data_asset_description: Epkinly (US), Tepkinly (EU) (epcoritamab) (Gen3013; DuoBody®-CD3xCD20) is a bispecific antibody created using Genmab's proprietary DuoBody® technology. It is designed to target CD3, which is expressed on T cells, and CD20 which is expressed on a majority of B cell malignancies. AbbVie and Genmab participate in the joint development and commercialization of Epcoritamab.

indication_rows.indication: Relapsed / Refractory Diffuse Large B-cell Lymphoma
First Line Diffuse Large B-cell Lymphoma

data_asset_indication: Immunoglobulin Light Chain (AL) Amyloidosis,Relapsed / Refractory Multiple Myeloma (MM)
data_asset_description: Etentamig (ABBV-383) is a BCMA x CD3 T-cell engaging bispecific antibody being studied in relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma and amyloidosis.
IMGN151 is a folate receptor alpha-targeting biparatropic antibody drug conjugate (ADC) with a maytansinoid derivative DM21 payload being investigated in gynecologic cancers.

data_asset_indication: Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer,Solid Tumors,Hepatocellular Carcinoma
data_asset_description: Livmoniplimab (ABBV-151) is an anti-GARP-TGF-β1 monoclonal antibody being investigated as an immunotherapy for the treatment of certain solid tumors.
Pivekimab is a CD123-targeting antibody drug conjugate (ADC) with a indolinobenzodiazepine DNA-targeting payload being investigated in BPDCN and AML.
ABBV-453 is an oral B-cell lymphoma 2 (BCL-2) inhibitor being investigated in relapsed or refractory (R/R) multiple myeloma (MM).

data_asset_indication: Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer,Colorectal Cancer,Gastroesophageal adenocarcinoma,Solid Tumors
data_asset_description: Temab-A (telisotuzumab adizutecan) (ABBV-400) is an antibody drug conjugate (ADC) targeting cMet with a topoisomerase 1 inhibitor (Top1i) payload that is being investigated to treat non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC), colorectal cancer (CRC) and gastroesophageal adenocarcinoma (GEA).
ABBV-6628 is an investigational monoclonal antibody fragment being developed for the treatment of geographic atrophy (GA) secondary to (AMD) age-related macular degeneration.

AGN-193408, a novel analogue of prostaglandin that increases the outflow of aqueous fluid from the eye and lowers intraocular pressure (IOP), is being investigated for the treatment of open angle glaucoma (OAG) and occular hypertension (OHT).

Surabgene Lomparvovec (ABBV-RGX-314) is a potential one-time gene therapy being investigated for the treatment of wet age-related macular degeneration (wet AMD), diabetic retinopathy (DR) and other chronic retinal diseases. ABBV-RGX-314 is being co-developed by REGENEXBIO and AbbVie.
BOTOX® is a neurotoxin being investigated for treatment of multiple conditions.
HArmonyCa™ is a dual-action hybrid injectable, with Calcium Hydroxyapatite and cross-linked Hyaluronic Acid, being investigated to restore mid facial volume.
JUVEDERM® VOLBELLA® XC is a cross-linked, injectable hyaluronic acid filler being investigated for use in infraorbital hollowing.
JUVEDERM® VOLITE® XC is a cross-linked, injectable hyaluronic acid filler being investigated to treat fine lines and skin quality attributes.
JUVEDERM® VOLUMA® XC is a cross-linked, injectable hyaluronic acid filler being investigated for use in temple augmentation.
Next Generation Collagen Filler is a dermal filler using recombinant human collagen technology under investigation to improve mid-face volume.
TrenibotE (trenibotulinumtoxinE) is being investigated for treatment of glabellar lines.
Tropoelastin is an injectable gel comprised of a cross-linked tropoelastin matrix under investigation for the correction of atrophic scars.
ABBV-295 is a long-acting amylin analog being investigated for the treatment of obesity.
Armour Thyroid being investigated for treatment of hypothyroidism.
